description: Miltank lead with a Shadow Samurott glass cannon running the unusual Razor Shell tech (over Megahorn) alongside Hydro Cannon, backed by a high-attack Sylveon as the win condition. Miltank banks energy and pivots to set up Samurott's shield pressure and Sylveon's late-game sweep.
performanceNotes: Razor Shell is a cheap bait move that lowers opponent defense, unlocking lethal Hydro Cannon hits and strong shield pressure
High-attack (15 ATK) Sylveon wins CMP and acts as a near-unbeatable closer when up on energy
Team felt slightly too weak to Shadow Gardevoir + Galarian Weezing cores

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: Shadow Samurott is a NIGHTMARE for opponents in the NAIC Cup! | Pokemon GO Battle League
